summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ShelterLink major update features. Backend APIs for admin management, profile system, and address fields work correctly (15/24 tests passed). Frontend admin dashboard and seeker experience work perfectly. Provider dashboard and bookings page have authentication/role-based routing issues preventing proper testing of provider-specific features.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Some registration attempts fail with 400 Bad Request, likely due to duplicate emails in test environment
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Use unique email addresses for testing

flaky_endpoints.issue: Seeker phone numbers not consistently visible in provider booking requests
flaky_endpoints.impact: Provider cannot see seeker contact info in booking requests

ui_bugs.issue: Provider dashboard not showing role-specific quick actions (My Listings, Requests, Bookings)
Missing Requests and History tabs for provider bookings view
Provider cannot access create listing page - authentication/routing issue

integration_issues.issue: Provider login successful but role-based dashboard content not loading correctly

passed_tests: Admin stats API shows simplified stats (Total Users: 7, Total Bookings: 4, Total Listings: 1)
Admin User Management tab with delete buttons (excluding admin users)
Admin Listing Management tab with takedown buttons
Admin Verificator Panel link accessible from overview
Seeker dashboard shows correct quick actions (Browse Shelters, My Bookings)
Seeker dashboard correctly has no stats cards
Settings page has all required profile fields (name, DOB, description, phone)
Profile photo upload from computer functionality
Phone number field with +61 prefix for seekers and providers
Listing detail shows 'Who owns this space' with clickable provider profile link
Address fields separated into Address, Suburb, Postcode (456 Test Avenue, Testville 2000)
Provider profile shows listings section and hides phone number
Seeker profile settings shows phone field
Public profile API works for different user roles
Backend listing creation with separate address fields
Backend profile update with phone number
Backend admin stats, user management, listing management APIs
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix provider dashboard role-based routing to show correct quick actions (My Listings, Requests, Bookings). Implement provider bookings page tabs (Requests for PENDING, History for ACCEPTED/REJECTED). Ensure provider authentication persists correctly for accessing create listing page. Verify seeker phone visibility in provider booking requests.

success_percentage.backend: 62% - Core admin, profile, and address features working. Some edge cases with registration and phone visibility need fixes
success_percentage.frontend: 75% - Admin and seeker experiences work perfectly. Provider dashboard and bookings page need role-based content fixes
